globalAttributes.name: data-splittext
globalAttributes.description:
**GSAP Animation ÔÇö SplitText line reveal** Splits the element's text into words and lines, then slides each line up from below a mask. Triggers once when the element scrolls to `top 75%` of the viewport. Waits for `document.fonts.ready` before splitting to avoid layout shift. **Combine with:** `data-prevent-flicker`, `data-delay` **Example:** ```html

Big headline

```

globalAttributes.name: data-fade-in
globalAttributes.description:
**GSAP Animation ÔÇö Fade in** Fades the element from `opacity: 0` to `1` when it scrolls into view (`top 75%`). No movement. **Combine with:** `data-duration`, `data-delay`, `data-prevent-flicker` **Example:** ```html
ÔÇŽ
```

globalAttributes.name: data-fade-up
globalAttributes.description:
**GSAP Animation ÔÇö Fade up** Fades the element in while sliding it up from `data-distance` pixels below its resting position. Triggers when the element scrolls to `top 75%`. **Combine with:** `data-duration`, `data-distance`, `data-delay`, `data-prevent-flicker` **Example:** ```html

ÔÇŽ

```

globalAttributes.name: data-fade-list
globalAttributes.description:
**GSAP Animation ÔÇö Staggered fade-up for children** Fades and slides up each child element of the list with a stagger between them. If the list has a single wrapper child (e.g. a Grid's inner div), the stagger automatically targets the grandchildren instead. **Combine with:** `data-duration`, `data-stagger`, `data-delay`, `data-prevent-flicker` **Example:** ```html
  • Item 1
  • Item 2
```

globalAttributes.name: data-prevent-flicker
globalAttributes.description:
**GSAP Modifier ÔÇö Prevent FOUC**

Hides the element via CSS until GSAP takes over and reveals it. Prevents a flash of unstyled content before the animation initializes.

If GSAP fails to load, a `gsap-not-found` class is added to `<html>` and CSS fallbacks restore visibility automatically.

**Use with any animation:** `data-fade-in`, `data-fade-up`, `data-fade-list`, `data-splittext`

**Value:** `"true"` (string ÔÇö required for the JS check)

values.name: true
values.description: Hide element until GSAP reveals it

globalAttributes.name: data-duration
globalAttributes.description:
**GSAP Modifier ÔÇö Animation duration**

Custom animation duration in seconds.

**Defaults:**
- `data-fade-in`, `data-fade-up`, `data-fade-list` Ôćĺ `0.5`
- `data-splittext` Ôćĺ `1.6` (not configurable via this attribute)

**Example:** `data-duration="0.8"`

globalAttributes.name: data-distance
globalAttributes.description:
**GSAP Modifier ÔÇö Translate distance**

Custom translate distance in pixels for `data-fade-up`. Sets how far below its resting position the element starts.

**Default:** `20`

**Example:** `data-distance="40"`

globalAttributes.name: data-stagger
globalAttributes.description:
**GSAP Modifier ÔÇö Stagger delay**

Custom stagger delay in seconds between children of `data-fade-list`.

**Default:** `0.2`

**Example:** `data-stagger="0.15"`

globalAttributes.name: data-delay
globalAttributes.description:
**GSAP Modifier ÔÇö Start delay** Delay before the animation starts, in seconds. Applied **after** the scroll trigger fires ÔÇö so in a hero section (which is in view on load), delays start counting immediately and cleanly sequence multiple elements. **Default:** `0` **Works with:** `data-fade-in`, `data-fade-up`, `data-fade-list`, `data-splittext` **Hero sequencing example:** ```html

Headline

Sub copy

```

globalAttributes.name: data-refresh
globalAttributes.description:
**GSAP Utility ÔÇö Manual ScrollTrigger refresh** Fires `ScrollTrigger.refresh()` once when this element first enters the viewport, then self-destructs. Use after content that loads asynchronously (images, embeds, dynamically injected DOM) to recalculate all trigger positions so downstream animations fire at the correct scroll offsets. **Example:** ```html
ÔÇŽlate-loading contentÔÇŽ
```
